headline: Here Are Tuesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Alaska Airlines, ConocoPhillips, Commvault Systems, CoreWeave, Diamondback Energy, JFrog Ltd, Microsoft, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: After a volatile start to the week, futures are trading lower on Tuesday. Markets had plummeted early Monday before the opening bell, only to stage a massive turnaround following news of a potential diplomatic breakthrough.
